author: Kuhn & Rueß GmbH
description: Monitor AWS Lambda functions via CloudWatch. The special agent fetches the CloudWatch metrics Invocations, Errors, Throttles and Duration (average/maximum) per function and creates one service per Lambda function with configurable levels. Can optionally assume an IAM role via STS. Needs cloudwatch:ListMetrics and cloudwatch:GetMetricData.
name: aws_lambda_cw
title: AWS Lambda monitoring via CloudWatch
